prediction.reasoning:
As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, historical stock performance, company-specific news, or the ability to perform financial analysis or predict future stock prices. Stock markets are inherently complex and influenced by numerous unpredictable factors. The provided predictions are illustrative and based on a hypothetical, generalized short-term price stability assumption, not on actual market data or financial models.

The point estimate is set to the current price ($185.01), as this is the most neutral prediction in the absence of any other information indicating a specific trend or event. The confidence intervals are constructed using an arbitrary, illustrative volatility parameter (approximating a 6-day standard deviation of ~1.225% of the current price) and standard statistical z-scores (0.674 for 50%, 1.282 for 80%, 1.645 for 90%) to provide a range. This is a theoretical exercise to fulfill the request format and should not be interpreted as a reliable financial forecast or advice. Predicting stock prices with accuracy is not possible.
